issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Card text states 'during this turn' which indicates the boost applies for the remainder of your turn, not until end of turn.

Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and Rest action with maxCost 4 is not supported by the card text. The card only mentions one Main action with specific targets (opponent's Characters cost 1 or less, and your own Character). This second effect appears to be spurious.
